Hq1.description: aft_llm_dual.top1 > naive_cosine.top1 on the affective subset (Δ > 0.05, one-tailed, Holm m=3)

Hq2.description: aft_gated_llm.top1 > aft_llm_dual.top1 on the full corpus (Δ > 0.05, one-tailed, Holm m=3)

Hq3.description: aft_gated_llm.top1 > naive_cosine.top1 on the full corpus (Δ > 0.05, one-tailed, Holm m=3)

Hq4.description: aft_gated_oracle vs naive_cosine, full corpus (exploratory upper bound)

Hq5.description: aft_gated_llm vs naive_cosine on the affect-free subset (exploratory: gate false-positive cost; expected ≈ 0)
